title: External Intent Refresh Preserve Scope
goal: Implement #474 so external intent refresh preserves the previous evidence scope by default when an evidence file already exists.
non_goals: Do not make GitHub a core planning dependency.
Do not add a new external-intent command.
Do not change provider-agnostic evidence file semantics.

intent.outcome: Running external-intent refresh without --state/--limit should not accidentally shrink an existing all-state audit evidence file.
intent.constraints: Keep provider-specific access in the optional GitHub adapter; core planning continues to consume only provider-agnostic evidence.
intent.latitude: Use previous refresh metadata for omitted state/limit and expose the resolved scope in output.
intent.escalation: Escalate if parser contracts cannot represent omitted state distinctly from an explicit user value.

execution.next_step: Archive, commit, push, close #474, refresh evidence, and continue the next prioritized lane.
execution.proof: workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning surfaces, summary/reconcile/proof dogfooding, doctor, root CLI authority audit

invariants: The shipped package remains repo-/host-agnostic outside optional adapters.
Existing evidence state/limit are reused only when the user omits those options.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #449 makes package use cheaper than bypassing it by removing trust and workflow friction.

required_continuation.activation trigger: after #474, refresh external evidence and continue the next prioritized lane

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make external intent refresh preserve audit scope by default.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not add host-specific assumptions to core planning.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact resolved-scope fields and test shape.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The fix would require broader command-generation work.

immediate_next_action: Archive, commit, push, close #474, refresh evidence, and continue the next prioritized lane.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/external-intent-refresh-preserve-scope.plan.json src/agentic_workspace/contracts/cli_commands.json src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json
completion_criteria: Omitting --state preserves previous refresh_metadata.state when existing evidence is present.
Omitting --limit preserves previous refresh_metadata.limit when existing evidence is present.
Explicit --state and --limit still override previous metadata.
Refresh output reports the resolved state/limit and prior scope source.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: external-intent refresh-github now preserves previous evidence state/limit when the user omits those options, keeps explicit overrides authoritative, and reports state_source/limit_source in command output and refresh metadata.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning surface check, compact summary, reconcile, proof selection, planning doctor, and root CLI authority audit all passed.
execution_summary.resume from: next prioritized roadmap lane after evidence refresh
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Keep the regression tests and resolved-scope metadata behavior as durable evidence; discard command transcripts and fake-gh traces; route only the remaining roadmap lane forward.

continuation.summary: Continue the next prioritized roadmap lane after closing #474 and refreshing external evidence.

config_check.summary: tests/test_workspace_cli.py guards preserved default state/limit scope and explicit override behavior.

issue_follow_up.summary: Close #474 with proof; keep the larger operating-cost lane open until remaining roadmap work is complete.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Make external intent refresh preserve audit scope by default.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The bounded slice is complete; archive-plan --prepare-closeout generated normalized closeout fields.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice is complete and remaining intent is routed to a checked-in continuation owner.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen when .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml roadmap lane feature-tier-and-surface-merge activates a fresh bounded slice.

cost_assessment.reason: The refresh command no longer silently narrows audit evidence, so agents can refresh and reconcile without remembering hidden scope flags. No new command or first-contact surface was added.

improvement_signal_review.finding: Hidden adapter defaults made evidence refresh cheaper to run but riskier to trust.
improvement_signal_review.resolution: Defaults now preserve the prior evidence scope unless the user explicitly changes it.

drift_log: 2026-04-28: Promoted from #438/#473 closeout dogfooding because hidden refresh defaults can silently change reconciliation scope.

proof_report.validation proof: workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning surface check, compact summary, reconcile, proof selection, planning doctor, and root CLI authority audit all passed.
proof_report.proof achieved now: yes; validation evidence is recorded in execution summary.
